description: Smooth, Easy Overall, it’s been a helpful tool. It made our workflow faster and kept the team on the same page.
author: Anvesha G.
pros: Made everything so much easier! Great It’s super easy to use and helps keep everything organized. I liked how it made tracking leads and follow-ups really simple.
cons: Nothing specific comes to mind at the moment — still exploring all the features and getting used to the platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Edge CRM made our sales process smoother and improved collaboration across the whole team. entire team can easly track and work on the priority

cons: Would love to see even more advanced features added to enhance what’s already a great platform and custom reporting features could be more flexible

description: i would rate 5 out 10

pros: The software is very useful - but the ease of access is a little complicated. Our company has most of the sales team, who is on file most of the time - also it's difficult during travel. Customer service is a little poor
cons: Some information is not required - where that has been emphasized more in CRM. There has been regular feedback given to the team.

description: It's been one pleasant experience.

Also a very nice and professional look it gives to the proposal which sets a good first impression on the client.
